C) iii, v D) ii, iv
55. Identify stage —
Difficult
Page No-166, Figure No-10.2 (c)
S\
| nr
Sold
a
A) Anaphase B) Telophase
C) Interphase D) Metaphase
10.2.4 Telophase
56. During telophase:
(i) Chromosome cluster at opposite
spindle poles
(ii) Two daughter nuclei formed
(iii) Chromosomes lose their individuality
(iv) It is reversal of prophase
(v) Nucleolus is not reformed
Choose the incorrect statement:-
Medium
Page No-166, Paragraph No-2
A) 1), (i) B) (iii), (iv)
C) (v) only D) none of these
10.2.5 Cytokinesis:
57. Match the following column —
Difficult
Page No-166, Paragraph No-3
Syncytium |i | Divide the
cytoplasm of
animal cell
Cell-plate |ii | Occur in liquid
endosperm of
coconut
c Cell iii | Method of
furrow cytokinesis in
plant cell
A) a-iii, b-ii, c-i
LINE BY LINE &
